landing.heroDesc: A comprehensive cloud accounting system that eliminates complex ledgers, fully compliant with ZATCA requirements.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to manage your company's accounting in one place
landing.feat1Desc: Issue electronic invoices compliant with ZATCA (Phase 2) with QR code and digital signature.
landing.feat2Desc: Track products, stock alerts, automated inventory, and stock movement reports.
landing.feat3Desc: Integrated chart of accounts, easy entries, cost centers, and general ledger.
landing.feat4Desc: Balance sheet, income statement, cash flow, and smart reports for decision making.
landing.feat5Desc: Complete customer and vendor records, account management, and AR/AP tracking.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the right plan for your business
landing.integrationsSubtitle: Connect your accounting software with your favorite tools
landing.intSallaDesc: Integration with Salla store for product and invoice sync
landing.intZidDesc: Direct connection with Zid platform for sales management
landing.intPaymentsDesc: Accept payments through Saudi payment gateways
landing.intPosDesc: Integrated point of sale system for stores and branches
landing.faq1A: Yes, Qoyod is fully compliant with ZATCA requirements for Phase 1 and Phase 2 of e-invoicing.
landing.faq2Q: Can I try Qoyod for free?
landing.faq2A: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. You can try all features.
landing.faq3Q: Is Qoyod suitable for small businesses?
landing.faq3A: Absolutely. Qoyod is designed for startups, small, and medium businesses. We have plans for all sizes.
landing.faq4A: Yes, we provide an integrated POS system that connects with your online store and branches for real-time sales management.
landing.footerDesc: A comprehensive cloud accounting system to manage your company's finances with ease and security

bookmarklet.title: Bookmarklet Inspector
bookmarklet.description: A browser bookmark that inspects any page element
bookmarklet.dragInstruction: Drag the button below to your bookmarks bar
bookmarklet.dragHint: Then click it on any page to inspect elements
bookmarklet.step1: Make sure your bookmarks bar is visible (Ctrl+Shift+B / Cmd+Shift+B)
bookmarklet.step2: Drag the blue button above to your bookmarks bar
bookmarklet.step3: Click the bookmark on any page to activate the element inspector
bookmarklet.feature1: Hover over any element to see its outline
bookmarklet.feature2: Click to view tag, classes, ID, and CSS selector
bookmarklet.feature3: Add a modification note and copy all info
bookmarklet.feature4: Works on any website, not just this app
bookmarklet.note: The bookmarklet only runs when you click it. It does not collect any data.
